scripts.build: turbo run build && node packages/tooling/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs build apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
scripts.test: turbo run test && node packages/tooling/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs test apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && node packages/tooling/scripts/run-dotnet.mjs build apps/api/EnglishCoach.sln --nologo -maxcpucount:1 -p:UseSharedCompilation=false
